feat.name: Dire Growth
feat.prerequisite: *Werecreature Dedication*; your animal shape is not Small
feat.text: You transform into a primal reflection of your animal shape. If you aren't already in your animal shape from Werecreature Dedication, you Change Shape into it. As long as you stay in animal shape, you have the effects of *enlarge*.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.
